form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Last start 9th of 11 at Townsville Bm60 on March 15 over 1200m, on a wet track; 3.5 len behind Impressionism with 57.5kg at $26. The start before that sat on the speed throughout before fading 7th of 14 at Townsville Bm55 on March 5 over 1200m, slow going 5 len behind Aspen Cowboy carrying 59kg at $20. Can improve on recent efforts.
